title: 8 Effective Herbal Creams for Nurses to Manage Infection Symptoms
description: Lavandula angustifolia creams are made from the dried flowers of the lavender plant, which contains properties that help fight off infections. The creams contain constituents like linalool and linalyl acetate, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. These properties help to reduce the growth of bacteria, fungi, and other microorganisms that cause infections. When applied topically, the creams can help to soothe and calm the affected area, reducing redness and swelling. ...
